utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) and travel_dates (July 1–5, 2024) are clear; transportation includes detailed flight info with airline, class, cost, and currency; accommodation includes hotel details, rating, location, and cost; activities include names, types, cost, and currency; additional_services include dining details with restaurant name, cuisine, cost, and currency; and total_budget provides the total cost. All items are complete and detailed.
